emails.subject: Forestweb, Inc.
emails.body: Forestweb, Inc. Can you please let me know if there are any existing NDA's in place with the referenced counterparty. Thank you!

emails.subject: Re: Forestweb, Inc.
emails.body: Re: Forestweb, Inc. I have a draft with Forestweb done in February of last year (Travis) for Enron NetWorks re their possible investment in a paper website no indication that it was ever signed. Kay C. Young Legal Specialist Enron North America Corp. 713-853-6794 Phone 713-646-3393 Fax kay.young@enron.com Tana Jones 03/09/2001 09:18 AM
